Title: Property Name
Details: The Meridian Casino & Resort

Details: Las Vegas Strip, Nevada

Title: Casino Hours
Details: 24 hours, 7 days a week

Title: Hotel Check-in
Details: 4:00 PM (early check-in subject to availability)

Details: 11:00 AM (late checkout available for suite guests)

Details: Complimentary for hotel guests, $25 for visitors

Title: Self Parking
Details: Free for all guests

Title: Dress Code
Details: Smart casual throughout property; formal attire required at Aurelia restaurant and Eclipse Lounge

Title: Age Requirement
Details: 21+ for casino floor and bars; all ages welcome in hotel and family restaurants

Title: Wi-Fi
Details: Complimentary throughout property; premium high-speed available in suites

Title: Slot Machines
Details: Over 2,000 machines ranging from $0.01 to $1,000 per spin. Includes latest video slots, classic reels, and progressive jackpots. Largest jackpot currently at $4.2 million.

Title: Blackjack
Details: Minimums from $25 to $10,000. Single deck, 6-deck, and Spanish 21 available.

Title: Poker Room
Details: Texas Hold'em (No Limit and Limit), Omaha, and Seven Card Stud. Daily tournaments at 11 AM and 7 PM. $200 buy-in for daily tournaments.

Title: Roulette
Details: Including American, European, and French roulette. Minimums from $15.

Title: Baccarat
Details: Private high-limit salon with 4 tables. Minimums from $50, high-limit from $5,000.

Title: Craps
Details: Minimums from $15. Lessons available daily at 10 AM.

Title: Sports Book
Details: Full bar service. Mobile betting available throughout property via Meridian app.

Title: High Limit Salon
Sub-title: Private gaming area with dedicated hosts
Details: By invitation or $50,000 credit line. Private restrooms, complimentary dining, personal butler service.

Title: Players Club
Details: Earn points on all play. Tiers: Gold, Platinum, Diamond, and invite-only Black.

Title: Deluxe Room
Details: King or two queens. City or pool view. From $299/night.

Title: Premier Room
Details: King bed, sitting area. Strip view. From $449/night.

Title: Luxury Suite
Details: Separate living room, marble bathroom with soaking tub. From $799/night.

Title: Penthouse Suite
Details: Two bedrooms, dining room, butler's pantry, private terrace. From $2,500/night.

Title: Chairman's Villa
Details: Three bedrooms, private pool, personal chef available, 24-hour butler. By inquiry only.

Title: Accessible Rooms
Details: Roll-in showers, lowered amenities, visual alerts. Request at booking.

Title: Aurelia
Details: Modern French cuisine by Chef Marcus Webb (2 Michelin stars). Tasting menu $285 per person, à la carte available. Dinner only, 6 PM - 10 PM. Reservations required. Formal attire.

Title: Silk Road
Details: Sushi bar, robata grill, dim sum. Open 11 AM - 11 PM daily. Reservations recommended for dinner. Smart casual. Prices $40-80 per person.

Title: The Steakhouse
Details: Dry-aged beef, fresh seafood. Open 5 PM - 11 PM. Reservations recommended. Smart casual. Prices $70-150 per person.

Title: Café Meridian
Details: Breakfast buffet 7-11 AM ($45). Lunch and dinner menu until midnight. No reservations needed.

Title: Pool Bar & Grill
Details: Burgers, salads, cocktails. 10 AM - 6 PM (seasonal). Hotel guests only.

Title: Eclipse Lounge
Details: Craft cocktails, champagne menu. Open 5 PM - 2 AM. Formal attire after 8 PM.

Title: The Vault
Details: 400+ whiskey selections. Humidor with premium cigars. Open 4 PM - 2 AM. 21+.

Title: Casino Floor Bars
Details: Complimentary drinks for active players. Full service available.

Title: Meridian Spa
Details: Massage, facials, body treatments. Couples suites available. Open 8 AM - 8 PM. Book 24 hours in advance recommended.

Title: Fitness Center
Details: Personal training available. Peloton bikes, free weights, yoga studio.

Title: Pool Complex
Details: Including adults-only infinity pool. Cabanas from $300/day (includes $100 food credit). Open 8 AM - 8 PM.

Title: Meridian Theater
Details: 200-seat venue
column5: Current residency: internationally acclaimed artists (check website for schedule). Tickets from $95. VIP packages available.

Title: Nightclub - NOVA
Details: Open Friday and Saturday, 10:30 PM - 4 AM. Cover $50 general, tables from $2,000. Guest list available for hotel guests.

Title: Weddings
Details: From intimate chapel to grand ballroom. Packages from $5,000 to $150,000. Wedding coordinator included in all packages.

Title: Private Events
Details: From 500 to 15,000 sq ft. Full catering and AV services. Corporate rates available.

Title: Birthday/Anniversary
Details: Include room upgrade, champagne, custom cake, and dinner credit. From $500 additional. 72-hour advance notice required.

Title: Bachelor/Bachelorette
Details: Including suite, nightclub table, pool cabana, and spa credits. Starting at $3,000. Must book 1 week in advance.
